Queen caps off jubilee from Palace balcony

Smiling widely and flanked by her heirs, the Queen observed a rendition of the national anthem at the end of her Platinum Jubilee weekend. Making her first appearance since Thursday, the 96-year-old monarch had the aid of a walking stick as she emerged on to the balcony of Buckingham Palace and waved at the crowd of thousands on The Mall.
